arabic: يَدْرُسُ الطُّلَّابُ فِي الجَامِعَاتِ الإِسْلَامِيَّةِ عُلُومَ الحَدِيثِ وَالفِقْهِ وَالعَقِيدَةِ وَأُصُولَ الدِّينِ.
translation: Studenti na islamskim sveučilištima studiraju nauke o hadisu, jurisprudenciji, akidi i temeljima vjere.
translationEn: Students at Islamic universities study the sciences of Hadith, jurisprudence, theology and the fundamentals of religion.
